positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a majestic celestial fox spirit (kitsune) surrounded by glowing bioluminescent flora and drifting stars. The fox has long, flowing fur rendered in deep midnight blues, emerald greens, and vibrant magentas. It is seated elegantly, looking directly at the viewer, with its tail forming a perfect circular composition. The background is an abstract gradient blend of deep space purples and nebula blues. The overall style should be a clean, high-contrast digital ink drawing, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be symmetrical and centrally focused. Flat vector-like shading with crystalline details and strong, crisp outlines. Cinematic, magical, spiritual, cosmic, elegant, joyful.
negative: artifacts, blur, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, noise, grain, messy, dirty, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, blurry, gradient background artifacts
